notes: Current period IS is Q2 2023 (2023-04-01 to 2023-06-30). CF values are YTD (2023-01-01 to 2023-06-30) as this is a Q2 10-Q filing; cf_is_ytd=true.
revenue_q: Total Sales and other operating revenues for Q2 2023 = 10306M (Trade 10149 + Related parties 157).

cogs_q: Cost of sales for Q2 2023 = 8868M. Impairments (0 in Q2 2023) are excluded from cogs and not included in total_opex_q as they are a separate non-recurring line; however they are included in the reported total operating costs line of 9295M.
gross_profit_q: Computed as revenue 10306 minus cogs 8868 = 1438M. LYB does not report a gross profit subtotal explicitly.

total_opex_q: R&D 32 + SGA 395 = 427M. Impairments of 0 in Q2 2023 are excluded as they are non-recurring and not part of core opex for formula purposes. Note: the IS total operating costs line (9295M) includes COGS + Impairments + SGA + R&D.
interest_expense_q: Stored as negative per convention. Q2 2023 gross interest expense = 115M on IS, stored as -115000000.
other_nonop_income_q: Other expense net for Q2 2023 = -7M (expense). Stored as reported.
equity_method_earnings_q: (Loss) income from equity investments Q2 2023 = -12M (loss).
pretax_income_q: Income from continuing operations before income taxes Q2 2023 = 905M (after equity method earnings). This is the standard pretax income line.
net_income_q: Using us-gaap:ProfitLoss (consolidated net income) = 715M for Q2 2023, which is the line the CF statement starts with (1189M YTD confirms this is the correct consolidated figure).
net_income_nci_q: LYB shows 'Dividends on redeemable non-controlling interests' of 1M as the NCI deduction to arrive at net income to Company shareholders. Used as NCI proxy = 1M for Q2 2023.
net_income_to_common_q: Net income attributable to Company shareholders Q2 2023 = 714M.

diluted_shares_q and basic_shares_q: Not explicitly provided in extraction as weighted average shares. EPS basic = 2.18, net income to common = 714M implies ~327M shares basic. EPS diluted = 2.18 implies ~327M shares diluted. However, since share counts are not directly in the extraction data, these fields are omitted to avoid deriving potentially inaccurate values.
eps_diluted_q: Total diluted EPS Q2 2023 = 2.18 (us-gaap:EarningsPerShareDiluted).
eps_basic_q: Total basic EPS Q2 2023 = 2.18 (us-gaap:EarningsPerShareBasic).
accounts_receivable_q: Pure trade AR net = 3638M per calculation_components.accounts_receivable. Related party AR 173M excluded.
accounts_payable_q: Pure trade AP = 3024M per calculation_components.accounts_payable. Related party AP 493M excluded.

short_term_debt_q: 130M per calculation_components.short_term_debt (precious metal financings). Current maturities of long-term debt (1206M) is mapped to long-term_debt_q as it is current portion of LTD, not short-term borrowings.
long_term_debt_q: Non-current long-term debt = 10276M. Current maturities of LTD (1206M) are included in current liabilities on the BS and not separately mapped here.

operating_lease_liabilities_q: Only non-current portion (1437M) is identifiable. Current portion is not separately disclosed on BS face (embedded in accrued liabilities). calculation_components.operating_leases.total = null. Using non-current only = 1437M; flagged as incomplete.
long_term_lease_liabilities_q: Non-current operating lease liabilities = 1437M.

total_liabilities_q: Derived as Total assets (36683) minus Total equity incl NCI (12945) minus Redeemable NCI (114) = 23624M. Note: the BS formula shows Total current liabilities (7017) + Long-term debt (10276) + Operating lease liabilities non-current (1437) + Other liabilities (1989) + Deferred income taxes (2905) = 23624M.
total_liabilities_and_equity_q: 36683M = Total assets. The BS total line is 'Total liabilities, redeemable non-controlling interests and equity' which equals total assets.
change_other_lt_liabilities_q: Mapped from CF 'Changes in assets and liabilities - Other, net' = 33M for YTD 2023, as no separate prepaid or accrued change line is available.
change_prepaid_q and change_accrued_q: Not separately disclosed on CF statement; absorbed into 'Other, net' working capital change. Omitted.
capex_q: Expenditures for PP&E YTD 2023 = -653M per calculation_components.capex.cf_value. Stored as negative.
acquisitions_q: No acquisition cash flow line identifiable per calculation_components.acquisitions.total = null. Omitted.
debt_repayment_q: No explicit debt repayment line in financing activities for YTD 2023 (only issuance of 500M and net commercial paper repayment of -200M). Omitted as a pure repayment line.
taxes_paid_q: Not available in extraction data. Omitted.
dna_q: Using primary D&A line of 787M (us-gaap:DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization) per calculation_components. Debt amortization of 4M is excluded as it is a separate financing cost item.
The goodwill impairment of 252M YTD 2023 (Q1 2023 event, 0 in Q2) flows through operating costs on IS. It is not separately mapped to a formula field but noted here.
Redeemable non-controlling interests of 114M is classified between liabilities and equity on the BS; it is excluded from both total_liabilities_q and equity_q calculations.
IS fields use the quarterly period 2023-07-01 to 2023-09-30 (Q3 2023 column).
CF fields are YTD (2023-01-01 to 2023-09-30) as this is a Q3 10-Q filing; cf_is_ytd=true.
gross_profit_q computed as revenue 10,625 minus cost of sales 9,177 = 1,448. LYB does not present a gross profit subtotal on the IS.
total_opex_q represents the non-COGS operating expenses (SGA 378 + R&D 31 + Impairments 25 = 434). Impairments of 25 are included as an operating cost line item on the IS.
total_nonop_income_q is omitted as LYB does not present a single net non-operating subtotal; individual components are mapped instead.
interest_expense_q stored as negative per convention: -125 for Q3 2023.
net_income_q uses us-gaap:ProfitLoss (consolidated net income = 747) as the starting point for the cash flow statement, per instructions.
net_income_to_common_q uses lyb:NetIncomeAvailabletoCompanyShareholders = 745, which is net income less redeemable NCI dividends of 2.

net_income_nci_q omitted: LYB does not separately present a noncontrolling interest income line on the IS. The NCI shown on the balance sheet (14) relates to non-redeemable NCI; redeemable NCI dividends of 2 are deducted to arrive at shareholders income.
diluted_shares_q and basic_shares_q omitted: weighted average shares outstanding are not present as explicit line items in the extraction data. EPS and net income are provided instead.
accounts_receivable_q uses the total of trade net (3,704) plus related parties (137) = 3,841 per calculation_components.accounts_receivable.value.
accounts_payable_q uses calculation_components.accounts_payable.value = 3,574 (trade 3,121 + related parties 453).
short_term_debt_q uses Short-term debt (us-gaap:ShortTermBorrowings = 112) plus Current maturities of long-term debt (781) = 893. Both are current debt obligations.

operating_lease_liabilities_q: only the noncurrent portion (1,397) is separately disclosed on the BS face. Current portion is embedded in accrued liabilities. Total cannot be confirmed; noncurrent value used per calculation_components flag.
long_term_lease_liabilities_q = 1,397 (us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent as disclosed on BS).

total_liabilities_q computed as total_liabilities_and_equity (36,875) minus redeemable NCI (114) minus total equity incl NCI (13,219) = 23,542. However, summing disclosed BS liability lines: current liabilities 7,000 + LT debt 10,213 + operating lease liabilities 1,397 + other liabilities 2,003 + deferred income taxes 2,929 = 23,542. Note: the extraction balance sheet formula shows Total assets = Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Operating lease liabilities + Other liabilities + Deferred income taxes + Redeemable NCI + Total equity = 36,875; backing out Redeemable NCI 114 and Total equity 13,219 gives total liabilities = 23,542. Updated total_liabilities_q to 23542000000.
CORRECTION: total_liabilities_q = 36,875 - 114 (redeemable NCI) - 13,219 (total equity incl NCI) = 23,542 million. Value set accordingly.
change_ar_q stored as -282 (negative = use of cash, AR increased) per CF statement convention where increase in AR is a cash outflow.
change_inventory_q stored as -196 (negative = use of cash, inventories increased).
change_ap_q stored as +31 (positive = source of cash, AP increased).

change_other_lt_liabilities_q maps to the 'Other, net (operating)' CF line of -294 (shown as positive 294 outflow on the statement for 2023 YTD, meaning it was a use of cash net). Actually the XBRL value for Other, net operating is +294 in 2023 per extraction (sign as reported on statement). Re-examining: extraction shows +294 for 2023 which per CF formula is added to arrive at CFO, meaning it was a source of cash. Storing as +294 in change_other_lt_liabilities_q.

CORRECTION on change_other_lt_liabilities_q: The extraction value is 294 for 2023-01-01_2023-09-30 per us-gaap:OtherOperatingActivitiesCashFlowStatement. This catch-all line is a source of cash (+294). Stored as 294000000.
capex_q stored as negative per convention: -1,047.
share_repurchases_q stored as negative: -211 (cash outflow).
dividends_q stored as negative: -1,204 (cash outflow).

taxes_paid_q omitted: no supplemental cash taxes paid disclosure found in the extraction.
deferred_tax_assets_q omitted: no deferred tax asset line item appears on the BS face; only deferred income tax liabilities (2,929) appear as a noncurrent liability.

short_term_investments_q omitted: marketable securities of 1,928 are classified within Cash and cash equivalents per the BS (not a separate current asset line); only disclosed as a sub-component in notes.

operating_lease_liabilities_q: Only the noncurrent portion (1380M) is available per calculation_components.operating_leases; current portion is embedded in Accrued and other current liabilities and not separately disclosed on the balance sheet face. However using BS formula: current liabilities (5993) + LT debt (11132) + operating lease liabilities noncurrent (1360) + other liabilities (2083) + deferred income taxes (2853) = 23421. Used 23421 - wait, recomputing: 5993+11132+1360+2083+2853 = 23421. But total_assets = 37263, redeemable NCI = 114, total equity incl NCI = 13728; 37263 - 13728 - 114 = 23421. Mapped as 23421000000.
